name: Steamed Bun Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour, baking powder, and sugar together on a clean surface.
2. Make a well in the middle of the mixture.
3. Gradually pour the milk into the well while using your fingers to combine it with the dry ingredients.
4. After the milk has been absorbed, add the remaining 1 1/2 ounces water and continue to work the dough.
5. Add lard in small pieces and continue working the dough.
6. Using a dough scraper in one hand, gather the dough together while kneading with the other hand.
7. Knead for 12 - 15 minutes until it becomes elastic.
8. Cover the dough with a moderately damp cloth and allow to rest for one hour. The dough must be used within 1-2 hours. Do not freeze. If not all of the dough is used within that time frame, use as starter by forming a well in half a pound of the starter and adding 1 cup flour, 2 1/2 teaspoons baking powder, 1/3 cup sugar, and combine well. Add 1 tablespoon hot water and combine well. Add 2 tablespoons lard, then knead for 12 - 15 minutes as per above. Most Chinese chefs use dough made from starter as they claim it tastes better.
